since_last: 49% of 87 AI names green; AI Chips & Compute leads +3.01%; AI bubble risk 57 Heating Up.

cards.headline: The tape: a mixed, rotational tape, 49% of AI names green
cards.body: SPX -0.10% · BTC -2.98% · Gold -2.75% · Nasdaq100 -0.43%. 49% of 87 AI names are green — a mixed, rotational tape. AI Chips & Compute is doing the heavy lifting at +3.01%.

cards.headline: AI Chips & Compute leads, AI Software & Cloud Infrastructure lags
cards.body: Strongest AI sector is AI Chips & Compute at +3.01%; weakest is AI Software & Cloud Infrastructure at -1.56%. Rotation within the AI trade, not a one-way move.

cards.headline: MU is the standout at +11.78%
cards.body: Leaders: MU +11.78%, QCOM +7.53%, LRCX +6.58%, AMAT +6.53%, TER +5.68%. Laggards: MDB -5.92%, BBAI -5.31%, AVAV -4.07%, SMR -4.05%.
cards.watch: Hot means attention, not direction — watch whether the leaders hold the bid or fade into the next session.

cards.headline: SpaceX (SPCX) -1.17% at $154.29
cards.body: The SpaceX debut keeps pulling attention — SPCX is -1.17% this session. The biggest IPO in history remains the tape's attention magnet.

cards.headline: Risk: AI bubble index 57 — Heating Up
cards.body: The composite AI Bubble Index sits at 57/100, led by Valuation at 85. Higher = frothier; the risk is everyone caring at once while valuations are already stretched.
